Treatment_Adverse_Event.description: Adverse event outcome counts for the treatment group. This variable and Control_Adverse_Event represent the same outcome (adverse event: Yes/No) measured for different groups (treatment vs. control).

Control_Adverse_Event.description: Adverse event outcome counts for the control group. This variable and Treatment_Adverse_Event represent the same outcome (adverse event: Yes/No) measured for different groups (treatment vs. control).
